'''''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novel written by [[Patricia C. Wrede]], based on a screenplay by [[George Lucas]] and [[Jonathan Hales]]. It adapts the film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], and it was first published in paperback by [[Scholastic]] on [[April 23]], [[2002]], prior to the film's release. The book was adapted into an [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (junior novelization audiobook)|unabridged audiobook]] narrated by [[Jonathan Davis]], and which also released on [[April 23]], [[2002]].<ref name="Audio">{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Episode-II-Novelization/dp/0807208264|text=Star Wars, Episode II – Attack of the Clones (Jr. Novelization) Audio, Cassette – Unabridged}}</ref>

==Publisher's summary==
''A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away....''

''A galaxy is undermined. An army emerges. A love is forbidden. A dark turn approaches.''

''The saga continues.''<ref name="Amazon" />
